resource.conclusion: Hepatitis C RNA: Detected. Hepatitis C RNA positive. Chronic HCV infection confirmed. Genotype 1a. Viral load 2.4 million IU/mL.
Syphilis IgG: Reactive. Positive result. Treponemal antibody test reactive. Consistent with active or previously treated syphilis infection.
Findings consistent with cirrhosis and fatty liver disease. Hepatic steatosis and nodular liver surface. Splenomegaly. Portal hypertension pattern. Impression: alcoholic liver disease with cirrhosis.

coding.display: Alcohol Use Disorder Identification Test total score [AUDIT-C]
